caption: The video concludes with a closing screen that thanks viewers for watching. The screen is black with white text prominently displaying "Thanks for watching!" at the top. Below this, there are three social media handles and a podcast link. The first handle is "@StevenDunks" accompanied by an Instagram logo, followed by "@StevieCeli" with a Twitter logo. Lastly, there is a link to the "Neverending Conversations Podcast," marked with a purple podcast icon. This end screen serves as a call to action, encouraging viewers to follow the creators on their respective platforms and listen to their podcast. The static nature of the screen suggests it is the final moment of the video, designed to leave a lasting impression and engage the audience further.
